title: bauhinia longiracemosa
intro: Bauhinia longiracemosa is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae, commonly known as the orchid tree due to its showy flowers resembling orchids. The plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Bauhinia longiracemosa include reducing fever and alleviating symptoms of respiratory infections, as well as supporting the immune system. The herbal preparations of Bauhinia longiracemosa typically involve boiling the roots or leaves to make a decoction, which can be consumed as a tea or used as a topical treatment.
